refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable monitoring, controlling, and optimizing energy consumption to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-functions clarifies how energy efficiency can be achieved through measurement, control, and optimization.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify energy consumption data collection accuracy, control algorithm effectiveness, and optimization outcomes against the target energy_per_ton metric.
sub_frs: FR1: Measure energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to achieve energy efficiency target.

candidate_dps: DP1: Deploy integrated energy and load sensors with telemetry reporting.
DP2: Implement adaptive vehicle control algorithms for energy management.
DP3: Use data analytics and feedback loops for operational optimization.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Deploy integrated energy and load sensors with telemetry reporting.

potential_sources: Telemetry data dependency between measurement and control modules
Feedback loop coupling between control and optimization
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is foundational and logically decoupled from control and optimization DPs at this level.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate sensor calibration and reliable telemetry transmission.
Risk of sensor failure impacting energy measurement accuracy.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding redundancy or health monitoring for sensors to mitigate measurement risks.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components including energy and load sensors and onboard telemetry hardware.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends energy consumption and tonnage data to NGHE Solution for analysis and control.

module_containment_scores.notes: Limited containment as sensors are physically on Vehicle; diffusion moderate due to telemetry data flow.
High containment as sensors and telemetry hardware are physically integrated in Vehicle.
Minimal containment; no direct sensor hardware or telemetry generation.
No containment or diffusion related to energy measurement.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Energy measurement DP is best contained within the Vehicle module due to physical sensor integration and telemetry hardware location.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in coordinating telemetry data with NGHE Solution for control and optimization.
Risk of hardware failure impacting data availability.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Establish robust telemetry interface protocols and fallback mechanisms to mitigate data loss.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes the energy efficiency requirement into measurable and controllable sub-functions; DP selection logically addresses the measurement sub-FR.

diffusion_risks: Telemetry data diffusion across modules may cause synchronization challenges.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Physical sensor integration in Vehicle module supports strong containment; telemetry interface is well-defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification of sensor data accuracy and telemetry transmission is feasible with existing test methods.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of measurement DP to Vehicle IM with defined telemetry interface to NGHE Solution.

recommended_revisions: Add sensor health monitoring to reduce measurement risk.
Define telemetry data protocols to ensure reliable data exchange.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, risks related to sensor reliability and telemetry data diffusion require mitigation before proceeding.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Measure energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to achieve energy efficiency target.

revise.why: Incorporate sensor health monitoring and telemetry robustness into DP selection to address identified risks.

assumptions: Sensors can be integrated physically into Vehicle module.
Telemetry interface supports reliable data transmission.
open_risks: Sensor failure impacting energy measurement accuracy.
Telemetry data loss or delay affecting control and optimization.
evidence_needed: Sensor calibration and reliability test results.
Telemetry interface performance under operational conditions.
